11-24-2025: update default OpenRouter model to llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free; fix example to llama-3.1-8b-instruct:free; add tests for generate-commit CLI
11-24-2025: Switch default LLM to Grok on OpenRouter, add OpenAI type hints via TYPE_CHECKING, robustify git diff/message decoding, simplify release date logic
11-25-2025: Add GitLab support: platform detection, MR number extraction/enrichment, API client with caching/retries/rate limits, compare URLs, CLI option, and tests
11-25-2025: Improve GitLab slug extraction regex and .git stripping; add tests for slug extraction (GitLab/GitHub) and PR/MR number extraction; minor import fixes
11-25-2025: feat: add Bitbucket Cloud support with API client, PR detection, caching, retries, and tests
11-29-2025: Add JSON output format support with formatter implementation and tests
11-29-2025: Add YAML output format support with formatter, CLI integration, and comprehensive tests
11-30-2025: Add environment variable expansion support in ConfigLoader for TOML/YAML configs
11-30-2025: Add --config CLI option for explicit config file path
11-30-2025: enhance error handling/UX: detailed auth/rate-limit errors with fix tips across clients; robust parser for edge cases (empty scopes/subjects/footers); early API key validation
